name: Chocolate Raisin Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Sift all ingredients into a medium-size bowl.
3. Cut in butter until mixture forms coarse crumbs.
4. Mix in raisins.
5. Form dough into soft balls and roll out on a floured surface to fit an 11-inch by 7-inch baking pan.
6. Press the dough into the pan and smooth the top.
7. Prick the dough well with a fork.
8. Bake for about 25 minutes or until lightly browned.
9. Cool for a few minutes.
10. Cut the cooled bars into squares using a sharp knife.
11. Melt chocolate in a small bowl over simmering water, stirring until smooth.
12. Dip the bars in melted chocolate and place on foil.
13. Let chocolate set at room temperature before serving or decorating with remaining chocolate if desired.
Note: This recipe does not include the attribution line or additional notes.
